testcase.name: paperscraper.tests.test_dump
testcase.error: paperscraper/tests/test_dump.py:10: in <module> from paperscraper.get_dumps import biorxiv, chemrxiv, medrxiv paperscraper/get_dumps/__init__.py:2: in <module> from .chemrxiv import chemrxiv # noqa ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ paperscraper/get_dumps/chemrxiv.py:11: in <module> from .utils.chemrxiv import ChemrxivAPI, download_full, parse_dump paperscraper/get_dumps/utils/chemrxiv/__init__.py:2: in <module> from .utils import * # noqa ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ paperscraper/get_dumps/utils/chemrxiv/utils.py:124: in <module> def download_full(save_dir: str, api: Optional[ChemrxivAPI] = None) -> None: ^^^^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'ChemrxivAPI' is not defined

testcase.name: paperscraper.xrxiv.tests.test_xrxiv
testcase.error: paperscraper/xrxiv/tests/test_xrxiv.py:3: in <module> from paperscraper.get_dumps import medrxiv paperscraper/get_dumps/__init__.py:2: in <module> from .chemrxiv import chemrxiv # noqa ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ paperscraper/get_dumps/chemrxiv.py:11: in <module> from .utils.chemrxiv import ChemrxivAPI, download_full, parse_dump paperscraper/get_dumps/utils/chemrxiv/__init__.py:2: in <module> from .utils import * # noqa ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ paperscraper/get_dumps/utils/chemrxiv/utils.py:124: in <module> def download_full(save_dir: str, api: Optional[ChemrxivAPI] = None) -> None: ^^^^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'ChemrxivAPI' is not defined
